---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for CallPilot Voice Ops
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## ✨ Feature Summary
A brief description of the proposed feature.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? What pain point does it address?

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe your proposed solution in detail.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## 📊 Impact Assessment
- **Users Affected**: Who would benefit from this feature?
- **Complexity**: How complex would this be to implement?
- **Breaking Changes**: Would this introduce breaking changes?

## 📋 Implementation Notes
Any technical details, dependencies, or considerations for implementation.

## 🎨 Mockups/Examples
If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or code examples.

---

**Note**: Feature requests are reviewed regularly. Please provide as much detail as possible to help us understand and prioritize your request.
